source.title: JUEGOS DESPEDIDA HISTORIAS Y +
source.note: Reference extraction only. This deliberately does not follow the app's production content schema.

minigame_templates.name: Timing · Bostezo

traits.original: Gurú de las finanzas - Puede usar monedas para timbear un nuevo tiro de dados, especulando que le saldrá mejor esta vez

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Spend 2 coins to apply a +5 percentage-point diceBias to face 5 for the next 3 rolls.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Replaces rerolling with a bounded, visible bias.

traits.original: Abstemio - Cada vez que le toca tomar alcohol debe pagar con sus monedas, el precio de ser desleal a sus principios

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: When a dedicated drink event is confirmed, apply an offlineAction and subtract 2 coins.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The drink event owns the trigger; no global alcohol-event tag is needed.

traits.original: Rugby - Si tiene un jugador directamente atrás, puede pasarle la ovalada (una penalidad o castigo que le haya tocado) a dicho jugador

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Once per game, transfer a 3-coin penalty to the nearest player behind Willy using coinTransfer.
proposed_adaptation.reason: This preserves the Rugby pass without redirecting an already-pending action.

traits.original: Larpi - Si saca 6, el próximo turno avanza la mitad (o redondeado para abajo en impares, 0 si saca 1) de lo que salga en los dados. Está en Pilar y no puede asistir

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: On a 6, apply a one-turn 0.5 movement effect to the next roll.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The conditional delayed application needs a small effect-composition check.

traits.original: Si saca 5 cinco veces seguidas, gana el juego

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: After a five-roll streak of face 5, apply a +5 percentage-point diceBias to face 5 for the next 3 rolls; never end the match.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Use a conditional consequence; add an exact-face streak condition so 6 does not count as a 5.

traits.original: Desempleo - Objetos en la tienda le salen 20% menos, consecuencia de no tener gastos fijos

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Do not port the 20% shop discount; artifact prices remain global.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Intentional scope decision: no per-player shop price modifiers.

traits.original: Frustración - Si sale anteúltimo en un juego, o empata por el último puesto, pasa a ser último. Tristeza nao tem fin

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: If Nico resolves as loser, subtract 3 coins; do not rewrite the ranking.
proposed_adaptation.reason: A loser consequence keeps the joke without mutating minigame order.

traits.original: Dormir en clase sin que le digan nada - Una vez por cada número de dado (ej: si le toca 1 solo una vez puede usarlo en 1, una vez en 2 etc) puede elegir saltear su turno y no avanzar lo que marquen los dados

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Replace six face-specific skip tokens with a fixed +5 percentage-point diceBias to face 6 for the next 2 rolls.
proposed_adaptation.reason: A small favorable bias replaces per-face inventory tracking.

traits.original: Ubuntu - Los juegos no están para Linux, se queda sin jugar un minijuego si la mesa define que linux no tiene soporte para él

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Facu still plays the minigame; resolve the Linux joke as a confirmed -3 coin penalty.
proposed_adaptation.reason: No player is excluded from the activity.

traits.original: Home office - Al no tener que viajar nunca, está descansado: Si saca 1 en los dados puede optar por tirar de nuevo y moverse la cantidad sacada sumado a 1 (ej: 1 + 4 = 5)

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: When rollEquals 1, use conditionalConsequences to move +2 and apply a +5 percentage-point bias to face 5 on the next roll.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The recovery is tied to the dice result without rerolling or roll arithmetic.

traits.original: Excusa - Si cae en un casillero con dos o más jugadores, pierde 2 turnos. Se congeló pensando una excusa para no asistir

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Do not inspect tile occupancy. If this source beat is authored, show its prompt and apply a fixed -3 coin penalty.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Intentional scope decision: no occupancy query or waiting state.

traits.original: Europa universalis IV - Si cae a un casillero con otro jugador en él,  puede desafiarlo a un duelo de historia: Otro jugador le muestra una bandera de un país de su elección, el que adivina gana x cantidad de monedas del otro jugador

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Use a dedicated event cell to start the existing buzzer trivia engine and transfer 3 coins from loser to winner.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The authored event replaces overlap-triggered duels.

traits.original: Zona punga - Si cae por primera vez en un barrio peligroso como Belgrano, Nuñez o Recoleta, pierde un turno. El miedo lo paraliza

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: On every landing on an authored dangerous-neighborhood cell, apply one skip turn.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The effect is repeatable; no first-entry memory is tracked.

traits.original: Aparición repentina - Si está detrás de TODOS los jugadores en el tablero, puede gastar su turno en aparecer en el casillero (n+1) delante de ellos. No esperaban encontrarlo ahí.

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Use a fixed self move of +6 spaces when this authored event resolves.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Removes global-rank lookup and leader-relative teleporting.

traits.original: Malas decisiones - Si cae en su posesión el bolso de Ikea, pierde todas sus monedas. Pago para sacarse el peso de encima

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Bolso de Ikea applies a fixed -5 coin consequence when the artifact is used.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The artifact use owns the effect; possession is never observed.

events.original_caption: La morsa ha sido despertada

presentation.prompt_caption: La morsa ha sido despertada: Intercambia posiciones con Bilbo

proposed_adaptation.proposed_version: Intercambia posiciones con Beltro (Bilbo).

presentation.prompt_caption: Sabes que tiraste cualquiera cuando el negro de la esquina te mira así: retrocede un casillero

proposed_adaptation.proposed_version: retrocede un casillero

proposed_adaptation.proposed_version: Aplicar un Effect de movementMultiplier x0,5 por 3 rounds; no depende de la sección del mapa.

events.original_caption: Tomaste mucho y te tienen que bañar…
events.original_effect_proposed: Perdés tu turno hasta que un jugador te alcance para despertarte. Si estás último, perdé dos turnos

presentation.prompt_caption: Tomaste mucho y te tienen que bañar… Perdés tu turno hasta que un jugador te alcance para despertarte. Si estás último, perdé dos turnos

proposed_adaptation.proposed_version: Aplicar skipTurn una vez. Omitir la condición de despertar y la excepción por último lugar.

events.original_caption: Te fijaste de más en Malnis, una menor.
events.original_effect_proposed: Avanza hasta la carcel, o el casillero que más se asemeje a dicha cárcel

presentation.prompt_caption: Te fijaste de más en Malnis, una menor. Avanza hasta la carcel, o el casillero que más se asemeje a dicha cárcel

proposed_adaptation.proposed_version: Reemplazar la cárcel por retroceder 6 casilleros.

events.original_effect_proposed: Mover a Frang hacia tu posición

proposed_adaptation.proposed_version: El host elige a Frang como destino y lo mueve a la posición del jugador que activó el evento; no se consulta proximidad ni rasgos.

events.original_caption: Te pones facha para el baile, tenes que ir caminando a costanera y vas a paso rápido

implementation_proposals.title: Bias the die; react to the result
implementation_proposals.description: Replace rerolls and roll arithmetic with diceBias before a roll. Then use conditionalConsequences for rollEquals, movementTotal across authored turns, or consecutiveRolls.

implementation_proposals.title: Five 5s grant a 5% bias—not a win
implementation_proposals.description: Willy never ends the match. After five exact rolls of 5, grant +5 percentage points on face 5 for the next 3 rolls. Add one exact-face streak condition so a 6 does not count as a 5.

implementation_proposals.title: Everyone plays; penalties resolve afterward
implementation_proposals.description: Do not exclude a player from a minigame. Keep them in the activity and resolve the joke through a confirmed coins consequence, such as -3 coins.

implementation_proposals.title: Use fixed moves or a chosen player position
implementation_proposals.description: Story effects may move a player forward or backward by a fixed number of cells. For player-position effects, let the host choose a player and resolve moveToPlayerPosition. Do not infer proximity, social relationships, ages, appearance, landmarks, or board occupancy.

implementation_proposals.title: Keep prices and rankings global
implementation_proposals.description: Do not add personal shop discounts or mutate a minigame ranking. Keep prices shared; where needed, use a normal coin reward or penalty after the outcome.

implementation_proposals.title: Make board jokes explicit prompts
implementation_proposals.description: Do not track occupancy, waiting-for-rescue state, first entry, artifact possession, or event-driven artifact grants. Reframe those beats as an authored prompt with a fixed move, skip turn, or coin change—or omit them.

implementation_proposals.title: Artifacts resolve when used
implementation_proposals.description: Keep artifact effects on use. Use fixed coins, movement, or a host-selected player position; do not listen for possession or grant an artifact from an event.

extraction_notes: Every event caption is retained separately from its source effect text.
Captions with multiple images are duplicated with distinct event IDs and a shared source_caption_group_id.
Trivia question 4 and its image-based answers are intentionally omitted.
The first image in the Eventos section has no adjacent caption; it is retained as an unassigned source image rather than guessed onto an event.
Implementation gaps were replaced with scoped adaptation proposals on 2026-07-10; omitted mechanics are intentional, not errors.
